Package org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp

Class ServerCapabilities

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp.ServerCapabilities
@Marshalled public class ServerCapabilities extends Object
MCP server capability advertisement in InitializeResult.
